full_text:
Xu Feng
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xu Feng. Along with Feng Xu planned with Ma Yuanyi to rebel with Yellow Scarves. Xu Feng was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Xu Feng lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
